title: Decision recall: tags[] + scope-as-area + search filters (D4a)
action: Per CONTEXT D4a (docs/history/decision-propagation/CONTEXT.md): extend the decisions store for structured recall. RED-FIRST: write skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_decisions_propagation.mjs FIRST (repo standalone convention — see scripts/lib/test-fixture.mjs and sibling tests), run it against the UNMODIFIED decisions.mjs/bee.mjs, and record the failing output via cells verify as red evidence BEFORE implementing. Then: in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/decisions.mjs, logDecision accepts optional tags (array of lowercase slugs, validated), stored on the decide event; scope keeps its existing free-string semantics, documented as the spec-area dimension. In skills/bee-hive/templates/bee.mjs: `decisions log` gains --tags (comma-separated); `decisions search` gains --tag (exact, case-insensitive), --scope with alias --area (exact, case-insensitive), --since (ISO date, inclusive), composable with --text — and --text becomes OPTIONAL whenever at least one structured filter is present (tag-only/scope-only recall is the point of GH #32; zero filters at all still refuses). `decisions active` gains the same filters (deliberate sibling extension beyond D4a's letter, logged). Legacy events without tags match only when no --tag filter is given. Mirror byte-identically into .bee/bin/lib/decisions.mjs and .bee/bin/bee.mjs; tests cover: tags round-trip, filter composition, --text-optional-with-filters, legacy-event behavior, empty store. Rerun render_plugin_skill_trees + release_manifest --write.

truths: decisions log --tags a,b round-trips; search --tag/--scope/--since/--text compose
search works with NO --text when a structured filter is present
legacy metadata-less events still searchable by text
RED-FIRST: failing run against unmodified code recorded as red evidence before implementation
prohibitions: No migration/rewrite of existing decisions.jsonl events
No new area field — scope IS the area dimension (fresh-eyes P2)
